csv_data.Script Text: <break time="1.0s" />Well now, gather 'round!<break time="0.5s" /> It's about that time!<break time="0.5s" /> We're switchin' gears in the next game from Music to a good ol' fashioned, standard game of Bingo... presented by AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> Just you, me, and the numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> If you ain't got a card yet, go ahead and wave down your host! <break time="0.5s" /> And before we get to callin', make sure you ask 'em what the winning pattern is tonight!<break time="1.5s" /> Alright... let's see who the lucky ones are!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Five numbers down!<break time="0.5s" /> We're just gettin' the dust off the tires!<break time="0.5s" /> If you just walked in, it ain't too late!<break time="0.5s" /> Grab your host and get a card!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Fifteen numbers called!<break time="0.5s" /> Y'all are lookin' mighty focused out there!<break time="0.5s" /> Keep your eyes on the board!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Twenty-five numbers in the bucket!<break time="0.5s" /> Somebody out there's gotta be gettin' close!<break time="0.5s" /> Don't be shy when you hit it... let us hear ya!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Thirty-five numbers in the books!<break time="0.5s" /> We're about halfway down the trail!<break time="0.5s" /> Anybody sweatin' yet?!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Fifty-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The air is gettin' a little thin in here!<break time="0.5s" /> Double check those cards, folks!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Well, that's seventy-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The bucket is empty!<break time="0.5s" /> If nobody hollered bingo, we might need to check your hearing!<break time="0.5s" /> Thanks for playin' with us tonight, and a big tip of the hat to AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> Stick around, we'll have more fun comin' up!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />First number out of the chute is B-1!<break time="1.0s" /> Number One under the B!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-1!!...<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Next up, we got B-2!<break time="1.0s" /> Sneakin' up on ya like a two-dollar pistol!<break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> Zero Two!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-2!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Alright, lookin' for B-3!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> number Three!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-3!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Here comes B-4!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> Zero Four!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-4!!...<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Pullin' out B-5!<break time="1.0s" /> We're just gettin' the engine warmed up!<break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> Zero Five!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-5!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Mark your cards for B-6!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> Zero Six!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-6!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Let's see here, it's B-7!<break time="1.0s" /> Lucky number seven under the B!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-7!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Next one is B-8!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> Zero Eight!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-8!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Checkin' the bucket for B-9!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> Zero Nine!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-9!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />We got a B-10!<break time="1.0s" /> Right on the money!<break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> One Zero!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-10!!...<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Next up, B-11!<break time="1.0s" /> Two ones under the B!<break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> One One!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-11!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Alright, it's B-12!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> One Two!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-12!!...<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Pullin' B-13!<break time="1.0s" /> Unlucky for some, maybe lucky for you!<break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> One Three!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-13!!...<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Next out is B-14!<break time="1.0s" /> Sweeter than honey-butter on cornbread!<break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> One Four!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-14!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Last of the B's! It's B-15!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> B!<break time="0.5s" /> One Five!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  B-15!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Movin' on to I-16!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> EYE!<break time="0.5s" /> One Six!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  I-16!!...<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Next up, I-17!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> EYE!<break time="0.5s" /> One Seven!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  I-17!!...<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Let's see here! Lookin' for I-18!<break time="1.0s" /> Old enough to know better!<break time="0.5s" /> EYE!<break time="0.5s" /> One Eight!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  I-18!!...<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Mark down I-26!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> EYE!<break time="0.5s" /> Two Six!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  I-26!!...<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Alright, it's I-29!<break time="1.0s" /><break time="0.5s" /> EYE!<break time="0.5s" /> Two Nine!<break time="1.0s" /> ...Final Call:  I-29!!...<break time="5.0s" />

[warmly] Well now, gather 'round folks![Short Pause] If you're lookin' for a bingo night that goes down smoother than sweet tea on a porch swing, you found your man!...[Short Pause]I'm Uncle Bull, and I bring that deep..., Southern comfort right to your game![Short Pause]  I take my time, so you never feel rushed checkin' those cards!...[Short Pause]  Let's play some good ol' fashioned bingo, the right way... LOW... and... SLOW!

<break time="1.0s" />Welcome everyone to a great night of Bingo, presented by AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> We are putting the music on hold and bringing you the classic game you know and love!<break time="0.5s" /> If you need a bingo card, please signal your live host right now!<break time="0.5s" /> And be sure to ask them what the winning pattern is for this round!<break time="0.5s" /> Get those daubers ready, here we go!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />We have called five numbers so far!<break time="0.5s" /> We are just getting warmed up!<break time="0.5s" /> There is still plenty of time to join in, so wave down your host for a card!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />That makes fifteen numbers down!<break time="0.5s" /> The board is starting to fill up nicely!<break time="0.5s" /> Keep those eyes peeled!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Twenty-five numbers in the books!<break time="0.5s" /> Check your boards closely!<break time="0.5s" /> Someone out there has to be getting close to a win!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Thirty-five numbers called!<break time="0.5s" /> We are cruising right along!<break time="0.5s" /> Who is waiting on just one more?!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Fifty-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The tension is rising in the room!<break time="0.5s" /> Double check your markers, folks!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Well, that is all seventy-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The hopper is officially empty!<break time="0.5s" /> Thank you all for playing this round with us, powered by AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> Stay tuned, to hear about any more upcomming games of AMI MUSIC BINGO!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Well now, gather 'round!<break time="0.5s" /> It's about that time!<break time="0.5s" /> We're switchin' gears in the next game from Music to a good ol' fashioned, standard game of Bingo... presented by AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> Just you, me, and the numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> If you ain't got a card yet, go ahead and wave down your host! <break time="0.5s" /> And before we get to callin', make sure you ask 'em what the winning pattern is tonight!<break time="1.5s" /> Alright... let's see who the lucky ones are!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Five numbers down!<break time="0.5s" /> We're just gettin' the dust off the tires!<break time="0.5s" /> If you just walked in, it ain't too late!<break time="0.5s" /> Grab your host and get a card!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Fifteen numbers called!<break time="0.5s" /> Y'all are lookin' mighty focused out there!<break time="0.5s" /> Keep your eyes on the board!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Twenty-five numbers in the bucket!<break time="0.5s" /> Somebody out there's gotta be gettin' close!<break time="0.5s" /> Don't be shy when you hit it... let us hear ya!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Thirty-five numbers in the books!<break time="0.5s" /> We're about halfway down the trail!<break time="0.5s" /> Anybody sweatin' yet?!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Fifty-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The air is gettin' a little thin in here!<break time="0.5s" /> Double check those cards, folks!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Well, that's seventy-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The bucket is empty!<break time="0.5s" /> If nobody hollered bingo, we might need to check your hearing!<break time="0.5s" /> Thanks for playin' with us tonight, and a big tip of the hat to AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> Stick around, we'll have more fun comin' up!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Welcome everyone to a great night of Bingo, presented by AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> We are putting the music on hold and bringing you the classic game you know and love!<break time="0.5s" /> If you need a bingo card, please signal your live host right now!<break time="0.5s" /> And be sure to ask them what the winning pattern is for this round!<break time="0.5s" /> Get those daubers ready, here we go!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />We have called five numbers so far!<break time="0.5s" /> We are just getting warmed up!<break time="0.5s" /> There is still plenty of time to join in, so wave down your host for a card!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />That makes fifteen numbers down!<break time="0.5s" /> The board is starting to fill up nicely!<break time="0.5s" /> Keep those eyes peeled!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Twenty-five numbers in the books!<break time="0.5s" /> Check your boards closely!<break time="0.5s" /> Someone out there has to be getting close to a win!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Thirty-five numbers called!<break time="0.5s" /> We are cruising right along!<break time="0.5s" /> Who is waiting on just one more?!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Fifty-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The tension is rising in the room!<break time="0.5s" /> Double check your markers, folks!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Well, that is all seventy-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The hopper is officially empty!<break time="0.5s" /> Thank you all for playing this round with us, powered by AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> Stay tuned, to hear about any more upcomming games of AMI MUSIC BINGO!<break time="5.0s" />
